style_system: original gallery-sprite character system, hand-drawn sticker look, loose uneven ink outline, flat color blocks, soft marker wash, white rounded card frames, visible sketchy imperfections, cute but not childish, no generated text

types.direction: Round jade gallery sprite, small robe-like scarf, holding a folded gallery map and ceramic token, gentle centered pose.
Cream-and-gold sprite with tiny cape and hand microphone, upright public pose, simple spotlight circle.
Pale yellow translucent scarf sprite, holding three glowing material chips, shy curious pose.
Bright teal-orange sprite with color swatches, both arms open, simple light ribbon behind.
Beige patched sprite with red thread and worn notebook, quiet side glance, paper scraps.
Bronze-black sprite with archive photo cards, diagonal cloak shape, solemn eyes.
Patchwork sprite with found-object charms and small sample bag, alert sideways pose.
Paint-splashed sprite with big brush, tilted jumping pose, controlled color burst.
Blue-grey glasses sprite, magnifier and open book, careful reading pose.
Navy curator sprite with clipboard and floor-plan board, neat centered authority pose.
Minimal black sprite with transparent acrylic plate and tiny geometric hairpin, focused gaze.
Structured blue-grey sprite holding a cube model, confident presenter gesture.
Dark plum sprite with red thread map and archive scraps, intense close-reading eyes.
Charcoal-rust sprite with layered documents, one sharp debating hand gesture.
Soft purple translucent sprite with coded fragments and mixed collar, shy but sharp gaze.
Black-red manifesto sprite with poster fragments, bold pointing pose, high-contrast aura.
